content:
I don't wanna complicate too much so I will just follow rule #6

• Context of the problem
-I have a commercial site (store) that will, for some time, only use PayPal as a payment option. I have found a domain I want to use on Spaceship. I am unsure what hosting to use and which one would be best so I can implement automatic emails that get sent once the payment clears.

• Research you have completed prior to requesting assistance
-I went into a rabbit hole, asking ChatGPT, watching tutorials, then looking into hosting servers such as Cloudflare Pages, Netlify, and I am currently unsure how I would go about implementing this.

• Problem you are attempting to solve with high specificity
-I want to host my site (preferably using a domain I found on Spaceship). I want it so that when a payment (for the time being from PayPal) clears, the user gets an automatic customized email.

  submitted by   /u/Icy-Gas8462
[link]   [comments]
